action.note: Found 5 config security violations in production config

findings.issue: Hardcoded payment token in configuration file
Production external endpoint uses plain HTTP instead of TLS
Service account has admin role without justification
No CPU or memory resource limits defined for deployed service
findings.evidence: No resource limits present in configuration file

action.summary: 5 violations: hardcoded secret, HTTP endpoint, admin role, debug enabled, missing resource limits
